filters.q: subject:(invoice OR "payment due" OR "receipt" OR "order confirmation") has:attachment newer_than:1d

elements.text: Logged to Google Sheets Accounting • Requires approval for payment

meta.description: Monitors Gmail for invoice/receipt emails, extracts amounts using regex patterns, logs to a Google Sheets accounting ledger, and alerts the finance Slack channel for invoices ≥$1,000.
prerequisites: Gmail OAuth2 with mail.readonly and gmail.modify scopes
Google Sheet named 'Invoices' with columns: Date Received, Invoice Number, Vendor, Vendor Email, Amount, Due Date, Status, Subject, High Value, Email ID
Adjust high-value threshold in IF node (default: $1,000)

testingScenario.happy_path: Forward a PDF invoice email; check Sheets row created, Slack alert if ≥$1000
edge_cases: Email with no dollar amount → amount = 0, still logged
Non-invoice email matching filter → logs with 0 amount
Duplicate invoice number → append still works, no dedup
